text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I guess this is what happens when your mind's not
in it.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I think I've had enough. I can't take any more
humiliation.
choice_data_list: I think we should keep trying.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Quit it with that gaze. You're way too intense
sometimes, you know that?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
When you look so determined... how am I
supposed to refuse?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Well, you're my trainer. Do whatever you want.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Seriously, what are you even thinking? I just don't get it.
